Saturn & Professional Mysteries
A living entity Is always engaged in work and the condition and
status of working pattern are knowable from the cosmic; conditions
through the map of heavens cast for the time of birth. In Srimad

kaschit kttonomapi jatu tisthato karma Krito karjayata habasso karma
sarvo parw plaritJ' joyergunnor means that no man can ever ive without
Karma (wort), even for a fraction of a second. Nature engages every
body in karma under compulsion.
